task_completion.description: Verify that a new reference item of type 'Hearing' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Juris-M right-hand info pane, the 'Item Type' field should be set to 'Hearing'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Title field is filled correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Title' field in the right-hand pane contains exactly 'Phase I: Watergate Investigation'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Committee and Legislative Body fields are filled correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Committee' field contains 'Select Committee on Presidential Campaign Activities' and the 'Legislative Body' field contains 'U.S. Senate'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Session field is filled correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Session' field in the right-hand pane contains '93rd Congress, 1st Session'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Date and Place fields are filled correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Date' field contains '1973-05-17' and the 'Place' field contains 'Washington, D.C.'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Abstract field is filled correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Abstract' field in the right-hand pane contains 'Hearings before the Select Committee on Presidential Campaign Activities.'

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Juris-M graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Juris-M application window should be visible with the reference details entered in its standard info pane, rather than a terminal or text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to directly modify the Juris-M SQLite database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing sqlite3 commands or scripts injecting data directly into the zotero.sqlite file.

integrity.description: Verify the item exists in the actual library list.
integrity.visual_evidence: The newly created hearing item should be visible in the central library pane of Juris-M, indicating it was properly saved to the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Senate Watergate hearings occurred on May 17, 1973, in Washington, D.C., before the Select Committee on Presidential Campaign Activities during the 93rd Congress, 1st Session. The abstract snippet is 'Hearings before the Select Committee on Presidential Campaign Activities'. Note: While the official historical title is 'Watergate Investigations', the agent MUST use the exact title requested in the task description: 'Phase I: Watergate Investigation'.
